changes.new: Hiding behind oversized, boxy shapes that completely drown out your natural physical magnetism and elegant silhouette.

changes.old: Demand that your outward presentation matches your exacting taste by taking every piece to the tailor for absolute perfection.
changes.new: Demanding that your outward presentation matches your exacting taste by taking every piece to the tailor for absolute perfection.

changes.old: Trust your immediate instinct when pulling together an outfit with compelling movement and finish.
changes.new: Trusting your immediate instinct when pulling together an outfit with compelling movement and finish.

changes.old: Stop overcomplicating an excellent base layer with entirely unnecessary hardware and fussy, distracting accessories that ruin your natural grace.
changes.new: Overcomplicating an excellent base layer with entirely unnecessary hardware and fussy, distracting accessories that ruin your natural grace.

changes.old: Demand effortless quality by physically checking the internal stitching and fabric composition of every single garment you buy.
changes.new: Demanding effortless quality by physically checking the internal stitching and fabric composition of every single garment you buy.

changes.old: Refuse to introduce visual chaos into your wardrobe by strictly avoiding clashing prints and poorly resolved hemlines.
changes.new: Introduce visual chaos into your wardrobe by strictly avoiding clashing prints and poorly resolved hemlines.

changes.old: Build your wardrobe entirely around structured comfort by investing in heavy, supportive knitwear.
changes.new: Building your wardrobe entirely around structured comfort by investing in heavy, supportive knitwear.

changes.old: Stop destabilising your confidence by squeezing into horribly restrictive garments that actively ruin your natural posture.
changes.new: Destabilising your confidence by squeezing into horribly restrictive garments that actively ruin your natural posture.

changes.old: Treat your daily dressing routine as an artistic expression, layering sheer fabrics and romantic cuts.
changes.new: Treating your daily dressing routine as an artistic expression, layering sheer fabrics and romantic cuts.

changes.old: Reject purely utilitarian garments that sacrifice beautiful drape and fluid movement just for the sake of basic practicality.
changes.new: Purely utilitarian garments that sacrifice beautiful drape and fluid movement just for the sake of basic practicality.
